name: swag-mcp
description: SWAG reverse proxy configuration management via MCP tools. Create, edit, view, and manage nginx proxy configurations with auth integration.

settings.name: SWAG Proxy Confs Path
settings.description: Path to SWAG nginx proxy configuration directory (e.g., /swag/nginx/proxy-confs)

settings.name: Default Auth Method
settings.description: Default authentication method for new proxy configs (none, basic, ldap, authelia, authentik, tinyauth)
